offer: For medical clinics processing 50–100 patient files/month, inefficient management of paper-based records causes delays in patient care. We convert patient files into electronic health records instead of manual filing and retrieval of paper records.
problem: Inefficient management of paper-based patient records.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
Direct message 20-50 medical clinics with demo video
Participate in community forums for medical tools sharing
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for data entry and secure storage for patient records on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for the first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
